---
title: "About"
toc: true
---

## About Me

[TODO: Add 3-4 paragraphs describing your professional background and career transition. Suggested framing:]

- [TODO: Paragraph 1 — Current role and what you do. E.g., "I'm a postdoctoral researcher at HHMI Janelia Research Campus where I design and build computational tools for neuroscience research."]
- [TODO: Paragraph 2 — The data science skills you've developed through research. Frame pipeline engineering, dashboard development, statistical analysis, and visualization as industry-transferable strengths.]
- [TODO: Paragraph 3 — What you're looking for next. E.g., "I'm seeking data science roles where I can apply my experience building production-quality data systems and turning complex datasets into actionable insights."]
- [TODO: Paragraph 4 — Your domain expertise as a differentiator. Your neuroscience background gives you unique strengths in working with complex, high-dimensional data.]

## Technical Skills

| Category | Skills |
|----------|--------|
| **Languages** | Python, MATLAB, SQL (Cypher/neuPrint) |
| **Data Engineering** | ETL pipelines, automated processing, Snakemake workflows |
| **Visualization** | Dash/Plotly, Matplotlib, Blender 3D rendering |
| **Data Science** | Statistical analysis, behavioral modeling, graph databases |
| **Tools & Platforms** | Git, GitHub Actions, Quarto, pixi, Jupyter |

## Education

- [TODO: PhD — Field, Institution, Year]
- [TODO: Additional degrees]

## Selected Publications

::: {.pub-timeline}
::: {.pub-year}
2025
:::
::: {.pub-entries}
::: {.pub-entry}
**[TODO: Paper Title](https://doi.org/TODO)**

Nern, A., Burnett, L., et al. *Nature*. 2025.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.pub-timeline}
::: {.pub-year}
[TODO]
:::
::: {.pub-entries}
::: {.pub-entry}
**[TODO: Paper Title](https://doi.org/TODO)**

[TODO: Authors]. *[TODO: Journal]*. [TODO: Year].
:::
::: {.pub-entry}
**[TODO: Paper Title](https://doi.org/TODO)**

[TODO: Authors]. *[TODO: Journal]*. [TODO: Year].
:::
:::
:::

## Contact

- Email: [{{< var links.email >}}](mailto:{{< var links.email >}})
- GitHub: [{{< var links.github >}}]({{< var links.github >}})
- LinkedIn: [{{< var links.linkedin >}}]({{< var links.linkedin >}})
- Google Scholar: [{{< var links.scholar >}}]({{< var links.scholar >}})
